_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning about how changing transportation and digital technology affect people's lives and places, including the environmental consequences.

_source.w: We are learning about how changing transportation and digital technology affect people's lives and places, including the environmental consequences.
y: Transport and digital connectivity are reshaping where and how people live, work, and interact.
These changes have significant environmental consequences — from emissions to land use — that require careful management.
Understanding these impacts helps us make informed choices about our own mobility and technology use.
eg: Investigating how the growth of ride-sharing, e-commerce, and remote work has changed urban transport patterns.
Analysing the environmental impact of aviation, shipping, and road freight on greenhouse gas emissions.
Examining how digital connectivity has changed the economic geography of work — enabling remote work but also creating digital divides.
Discussing how transport infrastructure decisions shape the character of places.
Evaluating the environmental trade-offs of electric vehicles versus public transport.
Examining how digital technology has transformed the spatial patterns of retailing — from high streets to fulfilment centres.
